arts.ttl: Liverpool 3-0 Bournemouth: Superb Darwin Nunez strike and two goals from Luis Diaz help Reds bounce back after shock loss to Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Nunez scored one of the best goals of the season so far as Liverpool beat Bournemouth convincingly at Anfield on Saturday. The Uruguayan forward's wonderstrike arrived in the 37th minute.

arts.ttl: Brighton boss left 'surprised' by Danny Welbeck as Joao Pedro injury update issued
arts.sum: Fabian Hurzeler is looking to continue his unbeaten start as Brighton boss when his side host another team that are yet to taste defeat in the Premier League in Nottingham Forest at the Amex on Sunday

arts.ttl: Hurzeler on Brighton's tactics: No midfield, a high line and pressing
arts.sum: The narrative of Fabian Hurzeler being the youngest Premier League manager in history is getting boring. Instead the question should be: Why is he the youngest top-flight coach in history?

arts.ttl: Ugarte's tough task at Man Utd, deadly Hudson-Odoi a Forest bargain
arts.sum: Manuel Ugarte was typically tenacious on his full Manchester United debut in their Carabao Cup third-round thrashing of Barnsley, his ball-winning ability even leading to a goal when his interception started the move for Alejandro Garnacho's fourth. Welcome to The Radar, a Sky Sports column in which Nick Wright uses a blend of data and opinion to shed light on need-to-know stories from up and down the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Brighton vs Nottingham Forest predictions: Tricky Trees can hold their hosts
arts.sum: Brighton and Nottingham Forest have enjoyed unbeaten starts to the new Premier League season and Ian Wilkerson expects them to share the spoils on Sunday afternoon.
